verses.text: Kuama delhlohpi-in migilote taimang a, mithumante ahih leh humpinelkai bangin a hang uh hi
Gamsung mite a hoihloh ciangin a banbanin gam uk kumpi tampi nei uh a, ahi zongin mipil thungaihsun theite in gamsung thahatsakin kipsak uh hi
Mizawngte a bawlsia aana a nei mipa pen lo-a ante a susiagawp guahzu tawh kibang hi
Thukham a zuilo mite in migilote pakta uh a, thukham a zui mite ahih leh migilote tawh kilemlo uh hi
Mi siahuaite in thutang cihmel theilo uh a, Topa a biate in ahih leh a kicingin a thei uh hi
Hau napi-in lungsimkawi mi hihna sangin zawng napi-in paubaan' neihlohna hoihzaw hi
Thuhilhna a mang mite ta pil hi a, lawm gilo tawh a kikhawl mi in a pa mindaisak hi
A meet a pung lakna tawh a hau mipa pen mizawngte a hehpih mipa-a' dingin sum a zon'sak hi lel hi
Mi khat in thukham a zuihnop kei leh ama thungetna nangawn Pasian in zakthadahhuai sa hi
A diktat mi khat siatsak ding a hanciampa pen ama tawhsa gum sung mahah kia ding hi. A dik mipa in gamh hoih luah ding a, migilopa in bangmah luahlo ding hi
Mihaupa pen amah pil kisa a, ahi zongin a zawng mi pilpa in a haupa' haina phawkkhia veve hi
Mihoihte in vangliatna a ngah ciangin mi khempeuh lungdam uh a, migilote a liat ciangin adangte in gimna thuak uh hi
A khialhna a im mite a dau pailo ding a, a mawhna pulakin a kikhel mite in hehpihna ngah ding uh hi
Topa a zahtak tawntungte pen mi nuamsa hi a, a lungkhauh mite in lungkhamna tuak ding uh hi
Mizawngte a uk migilopa pen humpinelkai gilkial leh vompi halungvei tawh kibang hi
Ngaihsut siamna a neilo gam ukpa a gilo kumpi hi ding a, thuman tawh ngah ding bek a deih mipa in sauveipi uk ding hi
Mi thatin a khialpa in ama hankhuk ding a to ahi hi. Ama hankhuk tawh kho kei in
Thumanin a gamta mite lungmuangin om ding uh a, a zuautat mite ahih leh puk ding uh hi
Nakpi takin lo a khopa hau mahmah a, bangmahin a kimang tumlo na a sempa zawng mahmah hi
A citak mipa in thupha tampi ngah ding a, a hau baih nuam mipa in gim tuak pelmawh ding hi
Mi langbawlna hoihlo a, ahi zongin letsong neucik khat hangin thukhente gamta khial thei zel hi
A huaiham mi in a hauhna dingin huai mengmeng a, a tawpna-ah a zawn' ding lamtak phawkkhalo hi
Mi khat tai-in thuhilh lecin tungthama phatna sangin a tawpna-ah lungdamzaw ding hi
A nu a pa' neihsa laksakin, “Khialhna hi kei,” a cipa pen guta mah hi veve hi
A huaiham mi in kitotna piangsak a, Topa a muang mite mihau hi ding hi
Ei leh ei kimuan'na haina hi a, mipilte' hilhna zuihna pen lungmuan'na ahi hi
Mizawng a huhte cimawh ngeilo ding a, huhna a pia nuamlote in samsiatna ngah ding hi
Migilote a liat ciangin midangte bucip uh a, amaute a zakiat ciangin midikte in ukkik ding hi.
